questionText: Who won the 2022 FIFA World Cup?
questionTextYoruba: Tani lo gba FIFA World Cup 2022?
questionTextHausa: Wanene ya lashe FIFA World Cup 2022?

questionText: Which country has won the most Olympic gold medals in athletics?
questionTextYoruba: Orile-ede wo lo ti gba ami-eye goolu Olympic to po julo ninu ere ije?
questionTextHausa: Wace kasa ta ci gwarzon zinare na Olympics a wasan tsere?
questionTextIgbo: Obodo ole nwetara ọla edo Olympic kacha nke ukwu na egwuregwu ọsọ?

questionText: In which year did Usain Bolt set the 100m world record?
questionTextYoruba: Ni odun wo ni Usain Bolt fi igbasilẹ agbaye 100m sile?
questionTextHausa: Wace shekara Usain Bolt ya kafa tarihin duniya na mita 100?
questionTextIgbo: N'afọ ole ka Usain Bolt tinyere ihe ncheta ụwa 100m?
